items.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Majors Slide on Iran Escalations, ETF Outflows
items.summary: Massive ETF outflows just sent crypto sharply lower. Jefferies says the next crypto IPO wave could create a $1T public market.

items.title: Bitcoin’s famous CME gaps are about to disappear, though three remain unresolved
items.summary: The launch of round-the-clock bitcoin futures trading eliminates the long-standing CME weekend gap and marks another step toward fully integrated institutional crypto markets.

items.title: Crypto slides on Hormuz airstrikes as $897 million in long liquidations pile up

items.title: Polymarket exec says KYC limited to beta product, not existing platform
